sections.paragraph:
ἐπεξεργάζομαι aor. inf. ἐπεξεργάσασθαι (ἐξεργάζομαι ‘work out, accomplish’; Soph. et al.; Just., D. 137, 4 ‘[accomplish] what has been discussed’) to cause or effect in addition, cause besides ὥστε … ἑαυτοῖς κίνδυνον ἐπεξεργάζεσθαι besides you are causing danger for yourselves 1 Cl 47:7.—DELG s.v. ἔργον.

aor. aor. = aorist

inf. inf. = infinitive

Soph Soph , V b.c.—List 5

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

Just Just , II a.d.—List 5

D D = Didache, except that in a list of manuscripts or as textual variant D refers to Codex Bezae—List 1

1 Cl 1 Cl = 1 Clement—List 1

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 361
